creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
inkscape immediately gets stuck after trying loading any kind of allowed data file (SVG, PDF, EPS ...) and eating up 100% CPU time.

This error message occurs in the console:

** (inkscape:1677): CRITICAL **: SPCurve* sp_curve_new_from_foreign_bpath(const NArtBpath*): assertion `new_bpath != NULL' failed
